description: Verso: Qaraite liturgical instructions for inserting a memorial prayer for several Qaraite leaders (Nesiʾim), "after the completion of the prayer for ʿAnan as is customary." Among the deceased Nesiʾim are Shelomo, David b. Ṣemaḥ, Yoshiyyahu, and the martyred Boʿaz. The blessing for the dead is followed by blessings for the wellbeing and prosperity of the (living), Nasi Ḥizqiyya (the successor of Yoshiyyahu) as well as for the Nasi David b. Yoshiyyahu. Beginning and end are missing. (Information in part from CUDL.) Join: Alan Elbaum
description_he: הוראות ליטורגיות קראיות לתפילת הזכרה לנשיאים קראים שנפטרו, עם ברכות לנשיא חזקיה ולנשיא דוד בן יאשיהו.
